data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Bundle pricing (cheaper together)', but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving a service and product, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate the pricing structure or any discounts applied for bundled services and products. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not support the necessary validation of the pricing requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the application of bundle pricing for services and products.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for bundle pricing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the bundle pricing requirement.
